findings.observation: Tree splitting logic implements chunking based on element count to mitigate large-payload issues.
findings.recommendation: Benchmark overhead of batch transition vs atomic processing for Elementor widget injection. Target: 20-50x speedup via batch-build-page (per IMPROVEMENT-PLAN Phase 2.1).

findings.observation: Visual QA script iterates through breakpoints but lacks explicit meta-query batching for post-data retrieval.
findings.recommendation: Implement batch metadata fetching if retrieving data for multiple post_ids concurrently. Use get_post_meta with object caching.

findings.observation: No explicit memory monitoring for node-based QA processes.
findings.recommendation: Integrate process.memoryUsage() alerts in the QA pipeline during large page audits. Consider stream-processing for large Elementor trees.

findings.observation: Axe-core is not integrated. visual-qa.js focuses on functional DOM checks (e.g., 404 image detection, error classes). No pa11y/lighthouse/wcag references found.
findings.recommendation: Inject axe-core into the Playwright/Puppeteer browser instance within visual-qa.js for automated accessibility regression. Add as npm dependency.

findings.observation: The codebase explicitly references WCAG 2.1; WCAG 2.2 features are currently unsupported by the static helper class.
findings.recommendation: Update relative_luminance and contrast math to support 2.2 additions (Target Size 2.5.8, Focus Appearance 2.4.11).

findings.observation: Missing automated A11y regression tests in CI; only basic UI sanity checks are performed.
findings.recommendation: Add an A11y-audit step to the pipeline utilizing existing browser automation infrastructure. Recommend pa11y-ci or axe-CI with JSON/HTML reports.
